evidence: The paper ranks microbiome features by importance and selects which to highlight based on rank position. Key passages: (1) "Based on the median calculated permutated variable importance, a ranking of which features contributed most to the prediction...the relative abundance of P. salivae is the most important predictor" and "ranked higher than both patient age and BMI"; (2) "Decreased P. salivae abundance was the strongest and most general predictor"; (3) Conclusion claims species with high importance "contribute to COVID-19 respiratory symptoms" and "the decreased abundance of some organisms, primarily P. salivae, is predictive." No corroboration via permutation importance, SHAP, PDP/ALE, conditional importance, or held-out validation of the ranking itself.
